import json
import os

# Count breeds in hardcoded file
with open\('/c/Users/Adir/Desktop/Coding/Dev/dog-globe/data-pipeline/breeds_hardcoded.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    hardcoded_breeds = json.load\(f\)

print\(f"Total breeds in breeds_hardcoded.json: {len\(hardcoded_breeds\)}"\)

# Check a few breed entries to understand structure
print\("\\nFirst 3 breed entries:"\)
for i, breed in enumerate\(hardcoded_breeds[:3]\):
    print\(f"\\n{i+1}. {breed.get\('id'\)} - {breed.get\('name'\)}"\)
    print\(f"   Keys: {', '.join\(breed.keys\(\)\)}"\)
